title: User Guides - App Settings Menu > User Guide
scenario: User Guide page displays supported devices with images, sections for onboarding and user guides, and an "Other devices" button linking to Poly support.
steps: Observe the list of supported devices with images.
Verify the page is split into two sections: 'Onboarding for Free 20 / Free60 / Free 60+' and 'User Guides for all other devices'.
Scroll to the bottom of the page.
Check for the text 'Not seeing your device?' and an 'Other devices' button.
Confirm that clicking the button opens the Poly support web page.
Locate the Back button in the top left corner.
Click the Back button and verify it navigates back.
expected: The User Guide page displays a list of supported devices with images, split into two sections: "Onboarding for Free 20 / Free60 / Free 60+" and "User Guides for all other devices". At the bottom, there is text "Not seeing your device?" and an "Other devices" button that opens the Poly support web page. A Back button is present in the top left corner.
